name: Discord Automation
description: Battle-tested playbook for Discord browser automation via CDP. Covers server navigation, channel browsing, messaging, DMs, reactions, server joining, friend requests, and search. Discord uses React with aria-labels and data-list-item-id attributes for reliable selectors.

message_actions.note: Message action buttons appear on hover over a message

message_input.upload_button: button[aria-label='Upload a File or Send Stickers and GIFs']

friends.friend_input: input[aria-label='You can add friends with their Discord username.']

steps: Type message via browser_fill_form with ~50ms delay
Press Enter to send (dispatch keydown Enter event on textbox)
Wait 1s for message to appear in chat
guards: Must have permission to send messages in channel
send_message.why: Discord message textbox is a contenteditable div with role='textbox'. browser_fill_form works reliably. Enter key sends the message.

steps: Click existing DM in sidebar, or click 'Create Message' button
If new DM: search for user in the dialog
guards: Must be friends or have mutual server for DMs

steps: Wait 2s for invite page to load
Wait 3-5s for redirect to server channel
May encounter CAPTCHA — cannot automate CAPTCHA
join_server_via_invite.why: Direct invite URL is the most reliable way to join. After accepting, Discord redirects to the server's default channel. Some servers require verification (Collab.Land bot, CAPTCHA).

steps: Wait 2s for discovery page to load
Browse category buttons: Gaming, Music, Entertainment, Science & Tech
Click server card to view details
Click server icon in left sidebar: [data-list-item-id='guildsnav___{serverId}']
Wait 1s for channel list to load
Text channels have aria-label containing '(text channel)'
Click desired channel to open it
guards: Must be a member of the server
navigate_channels.why: Discord uses data-list-item-id attributes with channel IDs for reliable selection. Locked channels show 'Voice (Locked)' in their text.

steps: Hover over message to reveal action buttons
Wait 1s for emoji picker to open
Search for emoji or click from grid
add_reaction.why: Message action buttons only appear on hover. Use browser_js to dispatch mouseover event on the message element first.

steps: Hover over message to reveal action buttons
Click 'Add Friend' tab in Friends area
Find input: input[aria-label='You can add friends with their Discord username.']
Click Search button in header: button[aria-label='Search']
Wait 1s for search panel to open
Filter by: from:, in:, has:, before:, after:, mentions:
Get username from [class*='username'], content from [id^='message-content-'], timestamp from time element
Scroll up to load older messages
guards: Must have read access to channel

errors.context: Any action when not logged in
errors.solution: Log in manually first. Discord uses email/password, QR code, or phone.

errors.context: Some servers require CAPTCHA verification when joining
errors.solution: Cannot automate CAPTCHA. User must complete it manually.

errors.context: Many servers require bot verification (Collab.Land, Wick, etc.) before accessing channels
errors.solution: Complete verification manually in the #verify channel. Most channels show as Locked until verified.

errors.error: Message action buttons only appear on hover
errors.context: Reply, React, Thread, More buttons are hidden until mouse hovers over message
errors.solution: Dispatch mouseover/mouseenter events on the message element via browser_js before clicking action buttons.

errors.error: Channel is locked / no send permission
errors.context: Announcement channels, locked channels, or channels requiring roles
errors.solution: Check for presence of div[role='textbox']. If missing, the channel is read-only or locked.

errors.error: Server discovery search doesn't submit on Enter
errors.context: Typing in discovery search input and pressing Enter may not trigger search
errors.solution: Type query and wait — Discord filters results in real-time. Or browse category tabs instead.

errors.error: DM requires friendship or mutual server
errors.context: Cannot DM users who have DMs closed unless friends or share a server
errors.solution: Send friend request first, or message in a mutual server channel.

errors.error: Frontmost app switches to VS Code when approving tool calls
errors.solution: Use CDP browser tools — they work regardless of which app is frontmost.

rate_limits: Discord has strict rate limiting — 429 Too Many Requests
safety: Discord actively detects automation — add 2-5s random delays
Don't mass-DM or spam channels — leads to account ban
Respect server rules and channel permissions
Some servers use anti-bot verification (CAPTCHA, phone verification)
Use browser_fill_form with 40-80ms delays for typing
tool_preferences: browser_fill_form — for message textbox, search, friend username input
browser_human_click — for channel navigation, server selection, button clicks
browser_js — for dispatching Enter key to send messages, hovering over messages for action buttons, extracting message data
browser_navigate — for direct navigation to servers/channels/invites
JS dispatch (mouseover) — for revealing message hover actions (reply, react)
